meaning: Every minute, but only during the even-numbered hours 0,2,4,…,22 (each even hour fires once per minute for the whole hour; odd hours never fire).
Every minute during the midnight hour only — 00:00, 00:01, …, 00:59 (the single hour 0, all 60 of its minutes).
candidates: 在凌晨0点至0点59分之间，每分钟
凌晨0点这一小时内，每分钟

meaning: Every second, at minutes 5, 20, 35 and 50 of the midnight hour — i.e. every second of 0:05, 0:20, 0:35 and 0:50.
candidates: 在凌晨0点，每小时5、20、35、50分，每秒
